name: Car By U
description_short: Car By U is a Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in Charlotte, NC offering guaranteed in-house auto financing for buyers with bad or no credit.
description_long:
Car By U is a used car dealership located at 6353 E. Independence Blvd in Charlotte, NC 28212, listed on AutoTrader's Buy Here Pay Here directory. The dealership operates as a one-stop shop where customers select a vehicle and secure financing on-site, targeting consumers who have been declined by traditional auto lenders. The east Charlotte location carries approximately 91 vehicles in inventory at any given time, and the dealership is open Monday through Friday 9 AM–7 PM and Saturday 10 AM–5 PM.

Car By U offers three financing pathways: in-house Buy Here Pay Here financing, credit union financing, and conventional bank financing. The BHPH track carries a guaranteed approval policy—stated requirements are a valid driver's license and active employment. Down payments start as low as $500 on select vehicles. Warranty coverage is available on most vehicles in inventory, and GAP insurance is offered on all financing contracts, providing protection if the vehicle is totaled while still under a financing agreement.

Unlike many BHPH-only lots, Car By U explicitly advertises multiple financing channels, meaning buyers with marginal credit may still qualify for credit union or bank terms rather than being locked into in-house rates. The $500 minimum down payment is relatively accessible within the subprime auto segment. The blanket availability of GAP insurance across all contracts is a notable consumer protection feature given the rapid depreciation typical of used vehicle inventory at this price point.

Car By U fills a genuine need for buyers with poor or no credit who require transportation. However, as with all BHPH operations, prospective buyers should expect interest rates substantially above prime auto loan averages; the dealership does not publicly disclose APR ranges. All transactions carry a $695 documentation fee on top of tax, title, tags, and any finance charges. Consumers should calculate total cost of ownership carefully. Crucially, Car By U provides vehicle financing—not cash disbursements—and should not be confused with emergency cash or personal loan providers.
pros: Guaranteed approval for all credit types — only requires a driver's license and verifiable employment
Down payments start as low as $500 on select vehicles, lowering the barrier to entry
Three financing channels offered: in-house BHPH, credit union, and conventional bank financing
GAP insurance available on all financing contracts — protects buyers if vehicle is totaled while financed
Warranty coverage available on most vehicles in inventory
Inventory of approximately 91 used vehicles provides meaningful selection for subprime buyers
Listed on AutoTrader's Buy Here Pay Here directory, providing external marketplace accountability
cons: APR rates not publicly disclosed — BHPH financing typically carries rates well above prime auto loan averages
$695 documentation fee charged on all transactions, in addition to tax, title, tags, and finance charges
Website has SSL certificate issues, limiting online research and reducing transparency
In-house BHPH financing may not report payment history to all three major credit bureaus
Used vehicle inventory only — no new cars available
best_for: Charlotte-area buyers with poor or no credit history who need reliable transportation
Consumers previously declined by traditional banks or credit unions for auto loans
Subprime borrowers who can provide proof of employment and a modest down payment starting at $500
Buyers who want GAP insurance protection bundled directly into their vehicle financing
diagnosis: Car By U is best suited for Charlotte-area consumers with damaged or nonexistent credit who need personal transportation and cannot qualify for conventional auto financing. The primary caveats are that Buy Here Pay Here interest rates are significantly higher than prime auto loan rates, APR is not disclosed upfront, and this is strictly a vehicle purchase and financing solution — no cash is disbursed to the borrower. The current 'emergency-cash' categorization is incorrect; 'personal-loans' is the closest available fit given the auto financing product offered.
services: Used vehicle sales (approximately 91 vehicles in inventory)
In-house Buy Here Pay Here financing
Guaranteed credit approval (driver's license + employment required)
GAP insurance on all financing contracts
Vehicle warranty coverage on most inventory
Low down payment options (from $500 on select vehicles)
Bad credit and no-credit auto loans
